calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Aug-26-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/V. Mack, CSR: Brenda Fields
Petitioner, present in pro per, was sworn and examined.
The Court grants the petition for change of name to Eve Fung Ye Wu.
Decree signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Aug-06-2003 Reset To Aug-21-03 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: Hon. Perker L. Meeks, Jr., Clerk Sadie Li, Reporter Maura Baldocchi #5207., Petitioner arrived late. Matter continued to August 21, 2003 at 9am in Department 218. (303)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jul-22-2003 Reset To Aug-05-03 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Judge: Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Ann Mendoza.
Petitioner, Eva Fenger Hu present in pro per, was sworn and examined.
This matter is continued to 8-5-03 at 09:00 am. for proof of publication.
